title: Circuit breaker re-trips immediately after recovery
description:
In delivery.rs, once a domain trips the circuit breaker (10+ consecutive failures), deliveries to that domain are skipped so record_success() is never called. After 1 hour, is_tripped() returns false and delivery resumes. But the failure count is never reset, so the first new failure after recovery immediately re-trips the breaker (count is still ≥10 and last.elapsed() < 3600s). A domain that had an outage and is now healthy can only ever get one delivery attempt per hour before re-tripping.

Fix: record_failure() should reset the count to 1 (not increment) if last.elapsed() >= 3600s, so a fresh failure window starts after recovery.
close_reason: All pass 2 fixes applied: circuit breaker reset, persona-scoped 410, SSRF private IP block, tokio::fs, URL scheme validation, Content-Type, page clamp, watch dedup
